title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind has developed a Deep research API that enables agents powered by Gemini to perform comprehensive research tasks with improved performance. The API can be implemented in applications using Google Cloud services.
writeup: The video covers Google DeepMind's Deep Research API, which lets Gemini-powered agents carry out comprehensive research tasks with improved performance. It walks through implementing the API in applications using Google Cloud services. The takeaways center on connecting the API to agent workflows for reasoning and workflow automation.
